overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera follows a character in red pants walking under elevated highways past industrial buildings and graffiti-covered walls, eventually crossing a neon-lit intersection. The scene features heavy rain, artificial street lighting, and a moody neon atmosphere typical of the game's Night City setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway next to industrial warehouse

events.description: passing a pedestrian holding a black umbrella walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked orange-tiled sidewalk beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: walking with a black umbrella, passing by ego on the left side

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure overhead with support columns
large concrete industrial building with yellow-barred windows and weathered facade
large illuminated advertising screens showing colorful graphics
tall black lampposts casting yellow-orange light on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass along a rain-soaked sidewalk. An industrial building with barred windows lines the right side while digital billboards glow in the distance. The camera passes a pedestrian with an umbrella walking the opposite direction under the yellow streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered walkway under overpass approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past colorful graffiti murals covering the right wall

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete retaining wall covered in colorful spray paint murals, tags, and street art
scattered trash bags and litter accumulated along the wall base

segments.scene_description: The industrial building gives way to a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right. The camera continues walking under the overpass, passing trash debris and utility boxes while approaching a more open intersection area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked intersection with neon signage and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: traffic light changes to green, character begins crossing the street with a companion
stepping off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk, entering the open intersection space

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street corner then crossing the wet asphalt intersection alongside another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: companion in dark clothing crossing the street together with ego toward the far corner

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet reflective asphalt
tall black pole with illuminated green walk signal and traffic lights
tall buildings with bright neon advertisements and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Arriving at a wide intersection beneath the overpass, the scene opens up to reveal neon-lit buildings and large digital billboards. The character waits for the traffic light to turn green, then crosses the rain-slicked street alongside a companion pedestrian, moving through the crosswalk toward the opposite corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement beneath a concrete overpass that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk beside an industrial building with barred windows, passing a pedestrian under the glow of yellow streetlights. As the camera advances, the industrial facade shifts into a graffiti-covered concrete wall lined with trash debris and utility boxes. The scene then opens up as the camera reaches a broad intersection dominated by towering digital billboards and vibrant neon signage. Finally, the character waits for the traffic light before crossing the rain-slicked street alongside a companion toward the opposite corner.
